description_long: This surveillance camera features a dual cylindrical design, each housing a separate camera module, both mounted on a circular base. The base is robust and slightly protruding, with visible mounting hardware and electrical wiring extending from the rear, indicating it is designed for fixed installation. The camera modules are angled outward, allowing for a wide field of view and increased coverage area. The exterior appears to be constructed from a matte-finished metal or high-grade plastic, providing durability and weather resistance. The wiring is sheathed and color-coded, suggesting easy integration with electrical systems. The overall design is utilitarian and functional, suitable for outdoor or semi-outdoor urban environments.
description: A dual cylindrical surveillance camera mounted on a circular base with exposed wiring, designed for wide-angle coverage and fixed installation.
description_view_0: Front view showing both cylindrical camera modules angled outward from the circular base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the base and the protruding camera modules, with visible wiring at the back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open back of the base and the bundled electrical wires extending outward.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the cylindrical modules and wiring from the other side.
